title: Ubiquiti INS-3AF-USB - PoE converter 802.3af/5V USB, indoor
description: USB converter serve to powering any device by USB port. Its converting 802.3af PoE to 5V/2A with 10W maximum load Important note: converter does not convert data from Ethernet to USB, but only power supply
specsSearch: Power Output Power / 1port [W] 10 Pin powering 1,2 (+), 3,6 (-) Output Voltage [V] 5
